scope: Bounded post-fix review of the current combined SKILL.md text and SUPERSESSION_NOTE.md only. The wide suite was not rerun and prior named-negative/attribution findings were not reopened.

evidence: SKILL.md:9 still points to undefined section 1.
SKILL.md:14 still says GPU provisioning is per section 12, but this skill has no section 12 and the obsolete operating-manual authority was removed.
SKILL.md:83-84 names NORTH_STAR_ROADMAP.md and inflight_lanes.md but still omits AGENTS.md and the relevant RUNBOOK.md section required by F1.
fix_verification.required_fix: Remove or replace the undefined section references and make the hard-rules reading set name NORTH_STAR_ROADMAP.md, AGENTS.md, the relevant RUNBOOK.md section, and manager coordination files only where applicable.

evidence: SKILL.md:115 uses the literal value <xhigh default | high mechanical | ultra blast-radius review>; zsh -n rejects the command with a parse error near >.

SKILL.md:120-121 runs the PID-1 assertion in the same shell that launched the process. A controlled zsh probe showed shell_pid=8736 and child_ppid=8736 after disown: disown removes job-table tracking but does not itself reparent a live child to PID 1.
fix_verification.required_fix: Use a shell-safe selected-tier value and place the PPID check after the launcher shell has actually exited, or use a genuinely detaching launch mechanism whose example demonstrably yields PPID 1.

evidence: SKILL.md:68-73 makes ownership a lead, requires causal evidence for nonblocking attribution, preserves PARTIAL/BLOCKED when failures are not proven pre-existing, and describes attribution as nonblocking for the ruling rather than erasing failures.

SKILL.md:146-155 requires worktree isolation at spawn, copy-out before completion under the default no-commit policy, explicit authority for in-worktree commits, and an integration or expressly authorized temporary immutable commit for promotion-grade suites.
SKILL.md:133-135 now makes SALVAGED_VERDICT.md provenance input only and requires the countersigning coordinator to emit schema-valid report.json before ruling.
SUPERSESSION_NOTE.md:2-10 honestly supersedes the lane-authored +40/0 scope, attributes the later coordination additions, and changes the deciding review tier to xhigh.

The note does not provide the requested exact combined numstat. The current combined diff is +114/-31, materially different from both the historical +40/0 lane slice and the +72/-18 snapshot reviewed in round one.
The note points to review.json, not this final review_fix.json or the final SKILL.md snapshot hash.
fix_verification.required_fix: Make the supersession record identify the final combined +114/-31 delta and bind or point to the final reviewed snapshot/review_fix record while preserving the historical lane report as historical evidence.

additional_findings.finding: SKILL.md:97-99 instructs a mandatory structured report whose objective_result is PASS/FAIL, but docs/racketsport/lane_report.schema.json:9-12 permits PASS, BLOCKED, or PARTIAL and does not permit FAIL. This can directly produce schema-invalid reports.
additional_findings.required_fix: State the exact objective_result enum PASS/BLOCKED/PARTIAL and reserve PASS/FAIL for individual acceptance-row verdicts.

coordinator_additions.evidence: SKILL.md:91-94 adds a forbidden-path list, own-log self-audit output, and threshold provenance without weakening protected/judge fences.
SKILL.md:182-186 requires full-log protected/judge contact review and does not substitute diff-only inspection.
SKILL.md:157-160 requires a session-start dirty-state cross-check and STOP on pre-existing dirty targets, consistent with AGENTS.md preservation rules.
SKILL.md:137-142 uses neutral data-integrity language and banks already verified context without instructing reviewers to suppress checks, evidence, or adverse findings.
SKILL.md:163-180 consistently makes xhigh the standard-review/default tier and confines ultra to blast-radius reviews; no remaining text mandates ultra for an ordinary lane.

suite_record.reason: The review spec explicitly prohibited rerunning the wide suite.

required_fixes_before_commit: Complete F1 by removing undefined section references and naming the full current authority set.
Complete F2 with a shell-valid tier selection and a truthful detached PPID example.
Complete F6 with the exact current combined delta and final snapshot/review binding.
excluded_from_commit: runs/manager/inflight_lanes.md and every unrelated dirty-worktree path
